title: Surfer Kids NPO to host competition at The Point
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Surfer Kids non-profit organisation and Bitcoin Ekasi will be hosting a surfing competition at The Point, Mossel Bay tomorrow, 23 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Surfer Kids non-profit organisation and Bitcoin Ekasi will be hosting a surfing competition at The Point, Mossel Bay tomorrow, 23 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The competition, called the Surfer Kids Surf Series, is the third to be held by the organisation this year. A fourth will be held in November this year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chuma Magusha of Surfer Kids said the purpose of the competition is to bring the Garden Route surfing community together and to grow the sport at the grassroots level in the region with the goal to produce future champions.","html":"Chuma Magusha of Surfer Kids said the purpose of the competition is to bring the Garden Route surfing community together and to grow the sport at the grassroots level in the region with the goal to produce future champions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The competition will start at 08:00 and anyone is welcome to come and watch.","html":"The competition will start at 08:00 and anyone is welcome to come and watch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you want to learn more about The Surfer Kids NPO and what they do, visit their Facebook page The Surfer Kids NON-Profit. You can also find them on Instagram @thesurferkids and on X @the_surfer_kids.","html":"If you want to learn more about The Surfer Kids NPO and what they do, visit their Facebook page The Surfer Kids NON-Profit. You can also find them on Instagram @thesurferkids and on X @the_surfer_kids."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Surfer Kids NPO to host competition at The Point
